specs.description: Canonical invocation #2 should have a DIFFERENT InvocationKey from #1
Canonical invocation with a non-prop class attribute should be DIFFERENT from pure canonical
Canonical invocation inside a structural directive should be DIFFERENT from pure canonical
Static prop invocation #1 (blue) should be different from canonical
Static prop invocation #3 (blue) should be DIFFERENT from #1 (blue)
Static prop invocation #2 (red) should be different from #1 (blue)
Dynamic prop invocation #1 (PrimaryCount) should be different from canonical
Dynamic prop invocation #3 (PrimaryCount) should be DIFFERENT from #1 (PrimaryCount)
Dynamic prop invocation #2 (SecondaryCount) should be different from #1 (PrimaryCount)
Prop with a different name (label vs count) should create a new unique invocation
Request override invocation should be different from canonical
